(N Engl J Med[jour] OR Lancet[jour] OR JAMA[jour] OR JAMA Pediatr[jour] OR Pediatrics[jour] OR J Pediatr[jour] OR Lancet Child Adolesc Health[jour] OR BMJ[jour]) AND (child OR pediatric OR infant OR neonatal) AND 2026/03/14:2026/03/16[edat]
広域小児検索補完: pediatric children infant neonatal 2026/03/14:2026/03/16[edat]

papers.title: Oral rehydration for severe malnutrition in children with moderate and severe dehydration (GASTROSAM)
papers.abstract: WHO-ORS resulted in similar outcomes to ReSoMal, and neither strategy led to fluid overload. RCT examining oral rehydration strategies in children with severe malnutrition and dehydration.
papers.summary_ja: 重症栄養不良と中等度〜重度脱水を持つ小児においてWHO-ORSとReSoMalは同等の転帰をもたらし、いずれも体液過剰を引き起こさなかった。
papers.search_query: Tier1ジャーナル検索（Lancet Child Adolesc Health）

papers.title: Sickle cell disease
papers.abstract: Sickle cell disease is a genetic red blood cell disorder, affecting millions of people globally. This Seminar provides a comprehensive update on the disease, encompassing its molecular basis, pathophysiology, clinical manifestations, management strategies including hydroxyurea, transfusions, and curative therapies such as stem cell transplantation and gene therapy.
papers.summary_ja: 全世界数百万人に影響する遺伝性赤血球疾患の分子病態・臨床管理・遺伝子治療を含む最新エビデンスの包括的アップデート。

papers.title: Effects of Extracorporeal Life Support Volume on Neonatal Mortality in Congenital Diaphragmatic Hernia
papers.type: 大規模レトロスペクティブコホート
papers.abstract: Retrospective cohort study of 29,499 neonatal cases requiring extracorporeal life support (ECLS) at 237 centers from 2000-2023, examining the relationship between institutional ECLS volume and neonatal mortality in congenital diaphragmatic hernia.
papers.summary_ja: 237施設2万9千例の大規模コホートで、CDH新生児へのECLS施設経験数と院内死亡率の関係を明らかにし、高件数施設での予後改善を示した。

papers.title: Efficacy and safety of biologics in children and adolescents with eosinophilic asthma: A systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.journal: Asian Pacific Journal of Allergy and Immunology
papers.abstract: Biologic agents targeting Type 2 inflammatory pathway are increasingly used in children and adolescents. 22 studies (n=2,468) were evaluated. Biologics significantly improved predicted FEV1 (SMD = 0.97, 95%CI: 0.38-1.57) with improved asthma control and quality of life, though adverse events were more frequent.
papers.summary_ja: 22研究・2,468例のメタ解析で小児好酸球性喘息へのバイオロジクスがFEV1を有意に改善（SMD=0.97）し、喘息コントロールとQOLを向上させることを示した。

papers.title: Social Media Use and Early Adolescent Brain Structure: Findings from the Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) Study
papers.abstract: Structural MRI analysis (n=7,614, ages 10-13) examining social media usage associations with cortical morphology. Higher social media usage is associated with variation in cortical morphology across prefrontal and temporal regions.
papers.summary_ja: 7,614人の10-13歳を対象にしたABCDスタディで、SNS使用量の増加が前頭前野・側頭葉を含む皮質形態の変化と関連することを脳構造MRIで示した。

papers.title: Survival, kidney function, and complications in first year of life following intrauterine shunting for first-trimester fetal megacystis (IUS1st)
papers.abstract: Congenital lower urinary tract obstruction is a major cause of chronic kidney disease in children. Severe first-trimester megacystis larger than 15 mm is associated with poor outcomes. This study assessed survival, kidney function, and complications in the first year of life following intrauterine vesico-amniotic shunting for severe first-trimester fetal megacystis.
papers.summary_ja: 先天性下部尿路閉塞（CLUTO）を有する胎児への子宮内膀胱羊水腔シャント後の生後1年の生存・腎機能・合併症を評価したコホート研究。
papers.search_query: Tier1ジャーナル検索（Lancet Child Adolesc Health）

papers.title: Comparative Efficacy and Safety of Zero-Fluoroscopy and Standard Transcatheter VSD Closure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.abstract: The Zero-Fluoroscopy approach has emerged as an alternative technique for transcatheter ventricular septal defect closure, eliminating radiation exposure by relying solely on echocardiographic guidance. This method is particularly beneficial for pediatric patients. Meta-analysis including 62 studies with 5,020 pediatric patients (mean age 11.11 years).
papers.summary_ja: 62研究・5,020例のメタ解析で、超音波ガイドのみによるゼロフルオロスコピー経カテーテルVSD閉鎖術は標準法と同等の安全性・有効性を持ち、小児の放射線被曝を完全に排除できることを示した。

papers.title: Hearing Screening Status and Influencing Factors of Hearing Loss in Critically Ill Neonates in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.abstract: Meta-analysis of 41 studies (n=56,886 neonates) on NICU hearing screening. Initial screening failure rate was 26% (95% CI: 21%-31%), while the overall prevalence of HL at follow-up was 3%.
papers.summary_ja: 41研究・56,886新生児のメタ解析でNICU入院児の聴覚スクリーニング初回不通過率は26%、フォローアップでの難聴有病率は3%と定量化し、早産・重症度が難聴リスクと関連した。

papers.title: Hydroxychloroquine use in pediatric IgA nephropathy
papers.abstract: Retrospective multicenter cohort of 16 children with IgA nephropathy treated with hydroxychloroquine showing 50% proteinuria reduction at 12 months and stable kidney function with excellent safety profile as adjunctive therapy.
papers.summary_ja: 多施設レトロコホート16例で小児IgA腎症へのヒドロキシクロロキン追加療法が12ヶ月でタンパク尿50%減少と腎機能安定をもたらし、安全性も良好だったと報告。
papers.domain_name: 小児IgA腎症・紫斑病性腎炎

papers.title: Prevalence and Factors Associated with Neonatal Hypothermia in Sub-Saharan Africa: Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.abstract: Neonatal hypothermia remains a significant contributor to neonatal mortality and morbidity in low and middle-income countries. 21 articles with 12,803 participants from 9 countries. Pooled prevalence of neonatal hypothermia was 55.39% (95% CI: 48.52, 62.25).
papers.summary_ja: 21研究・9カ国・12,803例のメタ解析で新生児低体温症の池平有病率は55.39%と高率であり、早産・低出生体重・在宅分娩が主要リスク因子であることを示した。

papers.title: Early fetal intervention: balancing technological breakthroughs and long-term morbidity
papers.abstract: Commentary on balancing technological advances in fetal intervention with long-term morbidity outcomes.
papers.summary_ja: IUS1st研究（PMID 41831479）に対応したLancet Child掲載コメンタリー。技術革新による胎児介入の進歩と長期罹患率のバランスについて論じる。
papers.domain_name: 新生児黄疸・代謝異常
papers.search_query: Tier1ジャーナル検索（Lancet Child Adolesc Health）

papers.title: Definition, Prevalence and Management of Dyslipidemia in Patients and Survivors of Childhood and Adolescent Cancer — A Systematic Review
papers.abstract: Systematic review of 53 studies. Dyslipidemia in cancer survivors showed heterogeneous definitions and prevalence across studies (hypertriglyceridemia: 0-75%). Lifestyle modification was identified as the primary intervention.
papers.summary_ja: 53研究のSRで小児がんサバイバーの脂質異常症は定義・有病率が研究間で不均一（中性脂肪高値: 0-75%）であり、ライフスタイル修正が主要介入として同定された。

papers.title: Benefits of Physiotherapy Interventions in Survivors of Childhood Cancer: A Systematic Review with Meta-Analysis
papers.abstract: Aerobic exercise interventions were identified as the most effective strategy for improving HRQoL in pediatric and adolescent cancer survivors, with improvements in depression symptoms and fatigue.
papers.summary_ja: メタ解析で有酸素運動介入が小児がんサバイバーのHRQoL・うつ症状・倦怠感を最も有効に改善することを示した。

papers.title: Precocious puberty: An overview of pathogenesis, clinical presentation, and management
papers.journal: Best Practice & Research Clinical Obstetrics & Gynaecology
papers.abstract: Precocious puberty, defined as the onset of secondary sexual characteristics at 2.5 SD below the mean age of onset (8 years in girls and 9 years in boys), is a complex clinical condition with considerable physiological and psychological consequences. Review of central and peripheral types, pathophysiology, and management strategies.
papers.summary_ja: 女児8歳以下・男児9歳以下の思春期早発症の病態生理・分類（中枢性/末梢性）・管理（GnRHアゴニスト含む）の包括的最新レビュー。肥満・環境因子の影響に言及。
papers.domain_name: 甲状腺疾患・成長障害

papers.title: An Infant Formula with Partially Hydrolyzed Whey and Intact Protein Demonstrates Adequate Growth and Safety: A 6-Month Randomized, Triple-Blind, Controlled Trial
papers.abstract: Triple-blind RCT (n=218) comparing partially hydrolyzed whey formula with standard formula in infants. Growth parameters were comparable between pHF and SF, with WHO z-scores remaining within ±1 SD of reference standards.
papers.summary_ja: 218例のトリプルブラインドRCTで部分加水分解ホエイ配合乳児粉乳と標準粉乳を比較し、成長パラメータ（WHO z-score ±1 SD内）は同等で安全性も良好だったことを示した。
papers.domain_name: 新生児黄疸・代謝異常
